title: unexpected result COPY <table> INTO STDOUT
description:
Not sure if this is a bug, but the result of this `copy ... into stdout` is a bit unexpected:
```
sql>create table t ( i int);
operation successful
sql>insert into t values (42);
1 affected row
sql>copy select * from t into stdout;
+------+
| i    |
+======+
+------+
1 tuple
1 affected row
```

**Expected behavior**
I'd expect to see the value from the table, e.g.:
```
sql>copy select * from t into stdout;
+------+
| i    |
+======+
|   42 |
+------+
1 tuple
1 affected row
```

**Software versions**
 - MonetDB version number [default]
 - OS and version: [e.g. Ubuntu 20.04]
 - Mercurial source
key_bug_features: COPY command not displaying inserted values in output
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INT REFERENCES t1(id), score FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
